01-ticket-lifecycle-create.feature.description: Validates ticket creation: default status, reporter capture, and title validation. The form rejects empty titles and assigns 'Normal' priority by default.

steps.action: Fill in a valid title and submit
steps.expected: The ticket is created with status Open and priority Normal

steps.action: Create a second ticket with the same title
steps.expected: A duplicate-title warning is shown, creation still allowed

02-ticket-lifecycle-transitions.feature.description: Covers status transitions (Open then In Progress then Closed) and the rules around who can reopen a closed ticket.

steps.action: Move an Open ticket to In Progress

steps.expected: Status badge reads Closed and the timeline records who closed it

03-notifications-assignment.feature.description: Notifications fire when a ticket is assigned, reassigned, or watched. Covers email and in-app channels.

04-sla-breach.feature.description: Behavior when a ticket exceeds its SLA: escalation, ping to the manager, status badge.
